title: oenothera prismatica var. tenuifolia
intro: Oenothera prismatica var. tenuifolia, also known as the slender evening primrose, is a plant species belonging to the evening primrose family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Oenothera prismatica var. tenuifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, salves, or infusions to utilize its medicinal properties effectively.
